name: Whiskey House Network Management System Adapter

connection_params.name: nms_api_url
connection_params.description: NMS REST API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8000/api/v1). Hosts 13 device/event/topology endpoints.

connection_params.name: nms_ws_url
connection_params.description: NMS WebSocket URL for real-time event streaming (e.g. ws://localhost:8000/api/v1/events/stream). Optional — if not provided, REST polling only.

connection_params.name: jwt_token
connection_params.description: JWT bearer token for authenticated REST/WebSocket requests.

connection_params.name: poll_interval_seconds
connection_params.description: Polling interval for REST endpoints in seconds. Default: 60.

connection_params.name: verify_ssl
connection_params.description: Verify SSL certificates for HTTPS connections. Default: true.
